prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-COOKTOOLS-PARENT Product Type: SPOON Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Spoons Spatula Kitchen Utensils Set High Heat Resistance Spoon Ladle Spatula Description: Want to step up your cooking and meal prep game? Then you need Beille kitchen utensil tools. These spoons, spatulas, and ladles are made with food-grade materials that does not cause harmful chemical contamination of food like other similar utensils.

The silicone or wheat straw tools mimic traditional plastic utensils and food turners without harmful byproducts. It features a solid head, is dishwasher safe, and can be used with hot and cold food ingredients.

Our tools a sturdy handle made of durable material so you can count on it to last, and the ergonomic handle design will provide comfort and help prevent slippage during use. The handle features a handy slot for easy hang storage if preferred, and it comes in a sleek, trendy color that will fit nicely with just about any kitchen decor.

Every kitchen needs a reliable, durable, and solid spatula. With the Beille kitchen utensils, you can cook and meal prep with peace of mind knowing you’re doing your part to protect yourself, your family, and the planet from harmful plastics. Search Terms: spoon silicone spoon spatula set metal spatula rubber spatula wheat straw utensils wheat straw dinnerware sets cooking tools kitchen gadgets kitchen utensils kitchen accessories food prep meal prep meal prep bowls sustainable products spoon rest Features: - ESSENTIAL KITCHEN UTENSILS - Beille utensils are a must-have kitchen tool for cooking, meal, and food prep. Large wooden handle with a broad spatula base will quickly and safely turn food while cooking and keep your hands safe from heat - FOOD GRADE MATERIALS - Kitchen spatula made of food-grade materials which do not cause harmful chemical contamination of food like other similar spatulas. Silicone and Wheat Straw are certified BPA-free and food-safe - SOLID AND DURABLE - Beille utensils use materials that mimic traditional plastic spatulas and food turners without harmful byproducts. Solid-head spatula is dishwasher safe and can be used with both hot and cold food ingredients - ERGONOMIC HANDLE - Sturdy handle made of durable materials so you can count on it to last, and ergonomic handle provides comfort during use; Comes with handy slot in handle for easy hang storage if preferred; Trendy color will fit nicely with any kitchen decor - SPECIFICATIONS - Colors: grey/wood, cream/stainless steel; Material: silicone, wood, wheat straw, stainless steel; Dimensions: 13” overall length; BPA-free and food-safe; Dishwasher safe: yes === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 13in Spoon Spatula Ladle Kitchen Utensils Set

tokens.name: Spoon Spatula Ladle Kitchen Utensils Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Food-Grade Silicone And Wheat Straw, BPA-Free, Dishwasher Safe, Heat Resistant, Ergonomic Handle

openai.title_differentiation: BPA-Free Food Grade, Dishwasher Safe, Heat Resistant, Ergonomic Handle, Hang Storage
